title: Ferolia griffithiana

Within the family Sapindaceae, Ferolia griffithiana is part of the order Sapindales. The classification of Ferolia griffithiana is further divided into kingdom Plantae, and phylum Magnoliophyta. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Southeast Asia.
